title: Shell Americas Android 8.9.0 Release
summary: Sprint 42 release. Includes loyalty rewards v1 integration, Lokalise strings update, and MSAL SDK 4.3 upgrade. EoSB1 process followed for develop and extra/pilot-8.9.0 branches.

title: Shell Americas Android 8.10.0 Release
summary: Sprint 43 release. Rewards API v1 migration preparations. Auth flow improvements for Android 13. Deep link routing updated for new station finder feature.

title: Shell Americas Android 8.11.0 Release
summary: Sprint 44 release. Rewards API v2 migration complete. Updated versionCode generation via updateconfig.py (5-digit format). Pilot validation process changed: madf/pilot no longer required, only extra/pilot-8.11.0 used for QA smoke test. android-release.yml now uses reusable workflow pattern.

title: Shell Americas Android 8.11.1 Hotfix
summary: Hotfix for critical auth regression in 8.11.0. MSAL 5.0.0-beta caused silent auth failures on certain device models. Rolled back to MSAL 4.9.0 while v5 upgrade is properly tested on feature/auth-v2 branch.

title: Shell Americas Android 8.12.0 Release Candidate
summary: Sprint 45 RC. Branch.io SDK upgraded to v5 with new /promotions and /stations/nearby deep links. Lokalise strings pull now automated via CI. Azure Secrets updated with v2 credentials.
